name: Metasploitable Recon
description: Reconnaissance and service validation lab on the Metasploitable2 Docker image.

objectives.title: TCP port scan finds open services

walkthrough.title: Start Metasploitable
walkthrough.body: Run `lab start metasploitable-recon` and wait for all mapped ports to come up.

walkthrough.title: Verify SSH
walkthrough.body: Connect with `ssh msfadmin@127.0.0.1 -p 2222` using password msfadmin.

walkthrough.title: Run recon modules
walkthrough.body: Use KittySploit scanners against 127.0.0.1, then score the lab with `lab score metasploitable-recon`.
